title: "Wine  - Shrunken screen"

forum: Wine

### Post by icyisaac100 on 2012-12-11
After using full screen windows applications, or when I am switching application, the whole screen shrinks. Any Ideas?

---

### Post by Futant on 2012-12-11
> **icyisaac100 said:**
> the whole screen shrinks.

What do you mean?

---

### Post by icyisaac100 on 2012-12-12
This is after I run dota 2 and other fullscreen windows applications.

Before      -                      After
[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/data:image/gif;base64,[/IMG]

### Post by wiebeest on 2012-12-19
> **icyisaac100 said:**
> This is after I run dota 2 and other fullscreen windows applications.

Does it still happen if you select "emulate virtual desktop" for that game in the "Graphics"-tab in the Wine-config?
Some specific games/ apps in Wine mess up my desktop resolution too after I close them. Setting up een emulated virtual desktop for them usually prevents that. Perhaps that could help you too?

---

### Post by icyisaac100 on 2012-12-21
Thanks, that did the job. :)

---
